images.alt: A semi-realistic oni noblewoman stands beneath lantern light in a moonlit shrine courtyard. Her long silver-blue hair cascades around elaborate floral ornaments and towering ivory horns, while crimson tattoos wind across her shoulder, neck, and collarbone. She wears an opulent black-and-crimson kimono embroidered with flowers, gold filigree, and skull motifs, its layered fabrics opening just enough to reveal the structure and movement of the garments beneath. One leg is subtly advanced through the parted robes, creating a poised, aristocratic stance rather than a dramatic pose. Behind her, weathered torii gates, stone lanterns, cherry blossoms, and carved demonic masks emerge from the darkness. Her expression is cool and unreadable—neither hostile nor welcoming—as if she is accustomed to being observed and entirely unconcerned by it. Warm lantern light and cool moonlight intermingle across the scene, highlighting the intricate textures of silk, jewelry, hair, and skin while preserving the atmosphere of an ancient shrine devoted to forgotten spirits.

Warm lantern light and cool moonlight intermingle across the scene, highlighting the intricate textures of silk, jewelry, hair, and skin while preserving the atmosphere of an ancient shrine devoted to forgotten spirits.

A striking black-and-white portrait shows a young girl seated against a textured interior wall, bathed in dramatic natural light. She rests her chin on folded hands, her knees drawn close, gazing upward toward an unseen source beyond the frame. Her hair is gathered in a loose, tangled bun with wisps escaping in every direction, catching the sunlight and creating a halo-like glow around her head. A single tear glistens on her cheek, adding a quiet emotional weight to the scene without revealing its cause.
Around her on the wall are delicate dandelion seed heads and scattered drifting seeds, their soft silhouettes echoed by sharp shadows cast by the strong side lighting. The contrast between bright highlights and deep shadows creates a contemplative atmosphere, emphasizing both the girl's thoughtful expression and the fragile beauty of the dandelions. Cracks, marks, and imperfections on the wall add texture and age, while the monochrome palette focuses attention on shape, light, and emotion. The composition feels intimate and reflective, capturing a fleeting moment of wonder, longing, or quiet imagination suspended in time.

images.alt:
A softly lit fantasy scene unfolds within what appears to be an abandoned stone corridor overtaken by flowering vines. In the center foreground, a young woman with long, tousled brown hair lies asleep across worn stone steps. She is dressed in a flowing ivory gown with loose sleeves that blend into the pale fabric gathered beneath her. Her head rests gently on her folded arms, her expression peaceful and undisturbed.
Pink blossoms and petals blanket nearly every surface. Flowering vines climb the stone walls on both sides, arching overhead to create a natural frame around the sleeping figure. Countless petals scatter across the steps and floor, forming a delicate carpet of soft pinks and creams. Sunlight streams through the opening behind her, filtered by branches and flowers, creating glowing circles of light and a gentle haze that fills the background.
The image uses a shallow depth of field, leaving the foreground and distant flowers softly blurred while drawing attention to the sleeping woman. The atmosphere feels quiet, timeless, and dreamlike, as though she has been resting there through many seasons while the garden slowly enveloped the ruins around her.
Keywords: sleeping woman, blossoms, floral vines, stone steps, abandoned ruins, sunlight, dreamscape, fantasy, petals, nature reclaimed, ethereal, forest

images.alt:
A modern classroom is viewed from the back, with several students seated in soft focus in the foreground. Their attention is fixed on a large whiteboard dominating the front wall. Instead of ordinary notes, the board displays an enormous human face formed from swirling translucent blue and white energy. The figure appears partially materialized, as if constructed from smoke, light, ink, and flowing strands of data. Mathematical equations, symbols, diagrams, and handwritten notes scatter across the board around the face, blending into the ethereal structure.
